race.comment: JOANJETT (11) finished runner-up at her last three outings and no excuses for this from the good draw. Came out quickly in the soft going with a narrow second over 1120m at Lismore. Key jockey change and should prove too strong for these. GRACEFUL WARRIOR (6) good return for the new yard with a closing third over 1040m at this track. Complete mystery when she gave in quickly to run ninth over 1181m at this track. Cross-over nose band goes on and deserves another chance. JENNIBELLE (7) will appreciate the claim after making her debut with a plugging third over 1006m at this track. Will be ridden for luck from the gate and not to be overlooked. HEZANUFF (1) caught the eye late first-up with a respectable sixth over 1181m at this track. Claim helps again with the right run. Each way.
